title: Solutions Engineer
description: GitLab is revolutionizing DevOps with an all-in-one platform that unifies the entire software development lifecycle. As a Solutions Engineer, you'll bridge the gap between our product and customers' technical needs. Help enterprises modernize their CI/CD pipelines and accelerate deployment cycles. Work hybrid from Nashville while collaborating with distributed teams.
responsibilities: Design technical solutions tailored to customer requirements and business challenges
Conduct product demonstrations and proof-of-concept implementations
Troubleshoot complex integration issues and provide technical guidance
Collaborate with sales, support, and engineering teams on customer success
Develop technical documentation and best practices for customer implementations

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field

benefits: Premium health, dental, and vision coverage
Flexible work schedule with hybrid Nashville office
Professional development budget and learning opportunities
